src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.general_idea: Add missing imports for OpenAPI model classes and Spring context annotations required by the new bean definition.
src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol for classes like OpenAPI, Components, Operation, PathItem, ApiResponse, ApiResponses, SecurityRequirement, List, and Bean.

src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.general_idea: Refactor AuthenticationManager bean to use the standard Spring Security 6+ approach via AuthenticationConfiguration instead of manually constructing a ProviderManager.
src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.why_exists: The manual construction of ProviderManager with a List<AuthenticationProvider> is deprecated or removed in newer Spring Security versions, and the preferred way is to delegate to AuthenticationConfiguration.getAuthenticationManager().

src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.general_idea: Update CORS configuration to use addAllowedOriginPattern instead of setAllowedOrigins for wildcard support.
src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.why_exists: Spring Security 6+ deprecates setAllowedOrigins for wildcard patterns; using addAllowedOriginPattern is required to avoid deprecation warnings and ensure correct behavior with wildcards.
